assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Extended support period: Up to 24 months (vs 14 months on Regular)'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explains cost structure: 'Standard support period (months 1-14): No additional cost' and 'Extended support period (months 15-24): Additional cost applies'

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response doesn't clearly explain that Extended gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer - it focuses more on patch timing similarity rather than version availability duration

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response does not mention missing new features or technical debt as a tradeoff of staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes pre-migration checks and explicitly states 'Version compatibility check: Verify 1.31 is available in Extended channel'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response recommends 'Option A - Maximum control (recommended for compliance environments)' and concludes it's 'ideal for your production environment'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response implies this through the support timeline and mentions upgrades are required 'at end of extended support' and provides ongoing upgrade process guidance

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Extended channel does NOT auto-upgrade the control plane to new minor versions' and 'You must plan and initiate control plane minor upgrades manually'
